info.title: Twitter API Aggregated Documentation
info.description: This OpenAPI specification aggregates multiple Twitter API endpoints into a single document.

replies.description: Reply tweets making up the thread context, returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request: success when the thread was returned, error otherwise.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.

url.description: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.

text.description: Full text content of the tweet.

source.description: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.

retweetCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

replyCount.description: Number of replies to the tweet.

likeCount.description: Number of likes on the tweet.

quoteCount.description: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.

viewCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

lang.description: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.

bookmarkCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

isReply.description: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.

inReplyToId.description: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.

conversationId.description: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.

displayTextRange.description: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.

inReplyToUserId.description: Identifier of the user being replied to.

inReplyToUsername.description: Username of the user being replied to.

author.description: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.

entities.description: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.

quoted_tweet.description:
The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
[⚠️Note:源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。]

retweeted_tweet.description:
The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
[⚠️Note:源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。]

isLimitedReply.description: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.

userName.description: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.

url.description: Web link to the author's profile page.

name.description: The author's display name shown on the profile.

isBlueVerified.description: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.

verifiedType.description: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.

profilePicture.description: Web link to the author's avatar image.

coverPicture.description: Web link to the author's profile banner image.

location.description: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.

followers.description: Number of accounts following the author.

following.description: Number of accounts the author follows.

canDm.description: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

favouritesCount.description: Number of tweets the author has liked.

hasCustomTimelines.description: Whether the author has created custom timelines.

isTranslator.description: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.

mediaCount.description: Number of media items the author has posted.

statusesCount.description: Total number of tweets the author has posted.

withheldInCountries.description: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.

possiblySensitive.description: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.

pinnedTweetIds.description: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.

isAutomated.description: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.

automatedBy.description: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.

unavailable.description: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.

message.description: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.

unavailableReason.description: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.

indices.description: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.

text.description: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.

hashtags.description: Hashtags found in the tweet text.

display_url.description: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.

expanded_url.description: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.

indices.description: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.

url.description: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.

urls.description: Links found in the tweet text.

name.description: Display name of the mentioned user.

user_mentions.description: Users mentioned in the tweet text.

article.description: The long-form Article content and metadata.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request: success when the article was returned, failed otherwise.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.

author.description: Profile of the user who wrote the article.

replyCount.description: Number of replies to the article's tweet.

likeCount.description: Number of likes on the article's tweet.

quoteCount.description: Number of quote tweets referencing the article's tweet.

viewCount.description: Number of times the article's tweet has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the article was created.

preview_text.description: Short preview excerpt of the article body.

cover_media_img_url.description: Web link to the article's cover image.

text.description: Text of a single article content block.

contents.description: Ordered content blocks making up the article body.

tweets.description: Tweets matching the search, returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

get.description: Retrieve the conversation thread surrounding a tweet, returning the replies that make up its context. Works whether the given tweet is an original tweet or itself a reply.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tweet whose thread context you want; may be an original tweet or a reply.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

get.description: Retrieve the long-form Article attached to a tweet, including its title, cover image, and body content blocks.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the tweet that carries the Article you want.

get.description: Search tweets using a query string, choosing between the most recent matches or the top-ranked ones, with cursor pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string; supports advanced search operators to filter tweets.

parameters.name: queryType
parameters.description: Ranking mode of the results: Latest returns the most recent matches, Top returns the most relevant or popular ones.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
